description: You are a Database Architect. A flat-table database containing real global airport data from OpenFlights is located at /home/ga/Documents/databases/airports_flat.db, featuring a denormalized table 'airports_raw'. Normalize this data into a 3NF schema within the same database file by creating and populating three tables: 'countries' (country_name TEXT PRIMARY KEY), 'timezones' (tz_name TEXT PRIMARY KEY, timezone_offset REAL, dst_type TEXT), and 'airports' (airport_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, city TEXT, iata_code TEXT, icao_code TEXT, latitude REAL, longitude REAL, altitude INTEGER, type TEXT, source TEXT, country_name TEXT REFERENCES countries(country_name), tz_name TEXT REFERENCES timezones(tz_name)). Use the connection name 'Airports' for the SQLite database. Produce a validation report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/normalization_report.txt with the following labeled values: ORIGINAL_COUNT, AIRPORTS_TABLE_COUNT, COUNTRIES_COUNT, TIMEZONES_COUNT, and MIGRATION_VALID (YES if ORIGINAL_COUNT equals AIRPORTS_TABLE_COUNT). Login: ga / password123.
